TYPE_SPECIFIC_CHECKS_DT_QTY_UCUM_ANNOTATIONS

fsh-generated/resources/Observation-CoreNeedleBiopsyMacroscopicCylinderCount01.jsonUCUM Codes that contain human readable annotations like {count} can be misleading (e.g. they are ignored when comparing units). Best Practice is not to depend on annotations in the UCUM code, so this usage should be checked

TYPE_SPECIFIC_CHECKS_DT_QTY_UCUM_ANNOTATIONS_NOT_IN_UNIT

fsh-generated/resources/Observation-RadicalProstatectomyLymphNodesExamined.jsonUCUM Codes that contain human readable annotations like {LymphNodes} can be misleading (e.g. they are ignored when comparing units). Best Practice is not to depend on annotations in the UCUM code, so this usage should be checked, and the Quantity.unit 'lymph nodes' SHOULD contain the annotation (it does not)
fsh-generated/resources/Observation-RadicalProstatectomyLymphNodesPositive.jsonUCUM Codes that contain human readable annotations like {LymphNodes} can be misleading (e.g. they are ignored when comparing units). Best Practice is not to depend on annotations in the UCUM code, so this usage should be checked, and the Quantity.unit 'lymph nodes' SHOULD contain the annotation (it does not)
